title: Household
emailPlaceholder: Email (optional) - or leave blank for code only
leaveHint: Your data remains in the household. You can rejoin at any time via a new invitation link.
leaveAdminHint: As admin you must first transfer the role or delete the household before you can leave.
deleteHint: Deletes the household and all associated data permanently. This action cannot be undone.

setup.title: Set up household
setup.subtitle: Create a new household or join an existing one.
setup.codeHint: You will receive the code from your household admin.
setup.createFailed: Household could not be created. Please try again.

settings.title: Household settings
settings.subtitle: These settings apply to all members of the household.
settings.noAccessHint: Household settings can only be edited by the admin.
settings.appModeHint: Defines which parts of the app are available to all members.
settings.apiKeyHint: Shared with all household members. Leave blank to disable AI features.

messages.inviteInvalid: The invitation is invalid or has expired.
